dialogue: Was it right, right, left? Or left, right, left... Oh no, it looks like I'm lost!
Ah? Someone is here! I'm glad you appeared, I was getting lo- I mean, I was getting to the treasure!
I heard this cursed tower has a precious chest at the end.
We just need to solve a few puzzles, but they're too hard for me...
Maybe you could do it!
I knew I was right to count on you!
Let's move on to the next one.
Another one... it's so easy I could do it my sleep, so I'll let you work it out.
Ha ha, no puzzle resists you!
Well... looks like there's more ahead...
I believe in you though!
You're so smart! Almost as smart as me.
More puzzles... but that's not a problem for us!
You're so good at this... maybe you should be a treasure hunter too?
Those next puzzles look harder, but I know you- I mean we can do it!
Wow, you solved those problems so easily!
With you, exploring the tower is so fast...
I could have done it alone too, of course! But its more fun together!
Only one more room before the treasure. I heard this puzzle was the hardest though, good luck!
Ha ha, you did it!
The treasure is all mi- all ours now
THE BIGGEST CHOCOLATE CAKE IN THE WORLD!!
Thank you for helping me... have some cake too, its for you
Next time I hunt a treasure, I'll make sure to call you, my friend!
